data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for completion photo evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the completion photo evidence requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for completion photo evidence but lacks concrete evidence of this functionality being implemented or tested. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for validating completion photo evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
